\tzpentry{ID5568}{Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5568 introduces Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\Omega_i}{\Omega_j} \approx \frac{p}{q}, \qquad p,q \in \mathbb{Z}_{>0}. \end{equation}
